message:
feat(browser): add read cache for fast repeated queries

- Cache parsed fragments in memory after first read
- Subsequent SELECTs serve from cache (sub-ms vs 1s from OPFS)
- Cache invalidated on DROP TABLE

Benchmark after cache:
- SELECT with WHERE: 938ms → 1.2ms (780x faster)
- COUNT aggregate: 1012ms → 1.4ms (720x faster)
- SUM aggregate: 1164ms → 0.5ms (2300x faster)
